opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My stump is burning and rubbing raw, and the old leg feels like it is cramping violently.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It's got much worse over the last few hours — the skin at the end of my stump is broken and raw, and the pain in the leg that isn't there anymore is unbearable. My usual tablets aren't touching it.

symptom_narrative.onset: the rubbing and soreness built up over about 24 hours from wearing the prosthetic leg, then this evening it got sharply worse
symptom_narrative.duration: much worse over the past 4 hours
symptom_narrative.character: burning and raw where the prosthesis rubs the end of the stump, plus a violent burning, cramping pain in the foot and lower leg that were amputated
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst it's been — I can't put the leg on and the nerve pain is unbearable
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the end of my stump where it rubs, and the missing lower leg and foot
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant and getting worse through the evening
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing — I've used up all my usual pain tablets and they haven't helped
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: wearing or leaning on the prosthesis, and any pressure or touch on the stump
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: my wife says the skin's broken with a small raw patch, and my lower back aches from limping and using the wheelchair
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I get phantom pains and some rubbing from the prosthesis now and then, but never a raw open patch like this
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't wear the prosthesis or bear weight on it at all; I'm stuck in the wheelchair tonight

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: left leg amputated below the knee
phantom pains in the missing leg
a tender, sore spot on the stump that flares up

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: I take it for the nerve pain and I've used up my extra doses tonight

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives at home with spouse, who is present and helping tonight; mobility is limited and he is using a wheelchair; there are loose rugs in a dimly lit hallway

objective_data_offered.value: my wife says the end of the stump has a small raw open sore about the size of a fingertip, and the skin around it is red and warm, over an area maybe the size of a golf ball
objective_data_offered.timing: she first noticed the broken skin about 4 hours ago
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: described over the phone by the spouse, not examined

objective_data_offered.value: using a wheelchair and unable to put any weight on the prosthesis
dimly lit hallway with loose scattered rugs
